description_long: This is a modern, expansive bungalow with a flat roof and a large, open courtyard featuring a swimming pool, palm trees, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The front facade includes a gated driveway with parking for several cars, and the property is enclosed by a low wall with lush landscaping along the perimeter. The building itself is primarily white with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious deck with additional seating and garden pavilions, while the side yards are lined with greenery and flowering trees. The structure appears to be single-story, with a clean, geometric design and a focus on outdoor living spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a strong emphasis on privacy and comfort.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and extensive outdoor living spaces including a pool, deck, and lush landscaping. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features a gated driveway with multiple parking spots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, parking area, main entrance, and pool with surrounding patio and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rear deck, garden pavilions, and extensive greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional garden space, and the full extent of the flat roof and side landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the outdoor seating areas, lush plantings, and the open layout of the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
